title: Amara's Sound Garden
synopsis: Baby Amara discovers different sounds in her backyard, counting from one to five as she encounters buzzing bees, chirping birds, and other musical nature sounds.

pages.text: Amara walks into her backyard. Listen! What sounds can she find?

illustration.description: A little girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes stands at a garden gate, surrounded by swirling golden sound waves that dance through the air like visible music
illustration.alt: Amara entering her backyard with sound waves visible around her

pages.text: ONE bee goes BUZZ! The sound makes yellow zigzag lines in the air.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes points at a single bee, with bright yellow jagged zigzag lines radiating from the bee to show the buzzing sound
illustration.alt: Amara watching one bee with yellow sound lines

pages.text: TWO birds sing TWEET TWEET! Blue wavy lines float like ribbons.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes looks up at two birds in a tree, with flowing blue ribbon-like wavy lines streaming from their beaks
illustration.alt: Amara listening to two birds with blue sound ribbons

pages.text: THREE frogs say RIBBIT! Green bouncing circles hop through the air.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes crouches by a pond watching three frogs, with bright green circular shapes bouncing upward to visualize their croaking sounds
illustration.alt: Amara watching three frogs with green bouncing sound circles

pages.text: FOUR cats meow! Pink dots dance and swirl around Amara.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits surrounded by four cats, with delicate pink dots spiraling and dancing through the air around them all
illustration.alt: Amara with four cats surrounded by pink sound dots

pages.text: FIVE dogs bark WOOF! Orange spiky bursts fill the sky. Amara claps her hands with joy!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps happily as five dogs bark around her, with explosive orange spiky starbursts radiating across the sky to show their loud barking
illustration.alt: Amara clapping with five dogs and orange sound bursts

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many bees did Amara see?
questions.explanation: Amara saw ONE bee that went BUZZ!

questions.question: What color were the bird sounds?
questions.explanation: The birds made blue wavy lines when they sang TWEET TWEET!

questions.question: How many dogs barked at the end?
questions.explanation: FIVE dogs barked WOOF and made orange spiky bursts!
